rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:12]>咦……？<unk[5:0]>
哈特诺村不在这边吗……
我好不容易才从格鲁德族人那里学到
制作<Color=red>沙海象布偶<Color=white>的方法，还做了一大堆……
本想拿去发给哈特诺学校的孩子们的……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:12]>奇怪了～？<unk[5:0]>
哈特諾村不是在這邊嗎……
我好不容易才從格魯德人那裡
學會並做了一大堆<Color=red>沙海象布偶<Color=white>……
本來還想送給哈特諾學校的孩子們……

<unk[3:0:12]>あれー<unk[5:0]>
ハテノ<Ruby={2:4}むら>村ってこっちじゃなかったっけ…

いっぱい<Ruby={2:4}つく>作った <Color=red>スナザラシのぬいぐるみ<Color=white>…

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]>Huh? <unk[5:0]>Was this NOT the way to
Hateno Village?<PageBreak>I can't get lost now. Not after spending
all that time with the Gerudo dollmaker
learning to make <Color=red>sand-seal plushes<Color=white>.<PageBreak>I refuse to give up on my dream of
handing these out to the schoolkids!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:3]>真希望布偶能让他们开心啊～<unk[5:0]>
但总有人说我长得很吓人……<unk[5:1]>
<unk[3:0:8]>啊，有了！<unk[5:1]>
不如练习一下面带着笑容来送礼物吧！
rows.TWzh:

<unk[3:0:8]>啊，有了！<unk[5:1]>

<unk[3:0:3]>I can't wait to see their faces light up
when I give them these stuffed toys.<unk[5:0]>
Hope I can remember not to glare at 'em.<unk[5:1]>
<unk[3:0:8]>Oh, I know! <unk[5:1]>I should practice my routine
so I can hand out the toys with a smile.
